item.title: Member Mornings: Jurassic Park Movie Matinee
item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Museum of Pop Culture, 325 5th Ave N, Seattle, WA

Join us for a screening of Jurassic Park, featured in MOPOP's latest Guest Curator Exhibition, Eco-Blockbusters: Environmentalism in Cinema.

Event details

item.title: Teacher Professional Development: Pop Culture & Activism
item.description:
Saturday, May 16, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Museum of Pop Culture, 325 5th Ave N, Seattle, WA

From musicians who use songs as a call to action to photographers who use images as protest, pop culture plays a critical role in activism.
